trainer_service.note: ict-trainer.timer enabled+active, ExecMainStatus=0. Last cycle 2026-06-10 01:11Z: manifests built rc=0, cycle_end overall_rc=0, publish_post_ok. Daily cadence healthy (prior cycles 06-09 00:21Z etc). Disk 19% (/home 37G free), RAM 5.9G ample.

trainer_datasets.note: BTC + MES regime market_raw datasets build fine (n_eval 570-105173). But mes-setup-quality + mes-trade-outcome-winrate manifests SKIP every cycle with empty_dataset — too few MES journal trades to build setup-quality/outcome datasets (recurring; ties to MB-20260530-001).

trainer_registry.note: 34 models registered, all status=candidate. 20 at shadow, 14 at research_only. No model above shadow (none influences orders). Registry healthy + growing.

Two research heads weak (btc-regime-1h-trend-lgbm-v1 macro_f1=0.337; mes-regime-15m-lgbm-yz-v1 0.285). None of these influence orders (all shadow-/research).

promotion_recommendations.evidence: Best regime head: macro_f1=0.663 (vs modal baseline ~0.29, +0.37 OOS edge computed under purged WF-CV in a prior gate-check, MB-20260607-002), retrained clean 06-10. BUT the shadow-soak completes 2026-06-12 (MB-20260527-004) — NOT yet due. HOLD until 06-12, then run `python -m ml gate-check btc-regime-1h-lgbm-yz-v1 --baseline-trainer RegimeClassifierTrainer` and promote only if ready:true.
promotion_recommendations.risk_note: Do NOT promote before 06-12 (soak incomplete). Shadow->advisory is the order-influence gate (Tier-3, operator). Kill-switch: demote-stage back to shadow.

experiments_proposed.name: mes-decision-rows-from-backtest
experiments_proposed.rationale: mes-setup-quality + mes-trade-outcome-winrate skip every cycle (empty_dataset) because live MES trades are too rare. Augment with per-trade BACKTEST rows so these journal-backed decision models can train (closes MB-20260530-001).
experiments_proposed.input_changes: Feed scripts/backtest rows for MES into the setup-quality/trade-outcome dataset builders.
experiments_proposed.expected_metric_signal: Non-empty MES setup-quality dataset (n_eval>0) + a non-degenerate f1 on the metalabel.
experiments_proposed.next_step: Extend src/ml/datasets builders to ingest backtest decision rows for MES.

experiments_proposed.name: retire-or-fix-weak-research-heads
experiments_proposed.rationale: btc-regime-1h-trend-lgbm-v1 (macro_f1=0.337) and mes-regime-15m-lgbm-yz-v1 (0.285) sit below/near the modal baseline after 6 runs — either feature-starved or mis-targeted. Decide: feature work or retire to stop spending cycle time.
experiments_proposed.input_changes: Review the trend/yz feature sets for these two manifests; add regime-discriminative features or drop.
experiments_proposed.expected_metric_signal: macro_f1 clears the modal baseline (>~0.40) within 2-3 runs, else retire.

backlog_drain.note: yz-1h promotion soak completes 2026-06-12 — NOT yet due (today 06-10). Health check this review: btc-regime-1h-lgbm-yz-v1 macro_f1=0.663, retrained clean 06-10, stage=shadow. On track; re-run gate-check on/after 06-12 with --baseline-trainer RegimeClassifierTrainer (per MB-20260607-002, resolved).

Re-confirmed need: mes-setup-quality + mes-trade-outcome-winrate STILL skip empty_dataset every cycle. The per-trade backtest-row augmentation is the fix — promoted to experiments_proposed this review.

Partial read: mes-regime-5m-lgbm-macro-v1 (macro_f1=0.566) currently TRAILS the plain mes-regime-5m-lgbm-v2 (0.621) — the macro/cross-asset features are NOT yet winning on macro_f1. Keep open; the A/B needs MES market_feature coverage + more eval before a verdict.
account_context decision-model wiring: the S12 Part B snapshot writer (account_context_snapshots) now exists (observe-only). Still needs the as-of-signal-time join into a decision model. Carry.

anomalies: mes-regime-classifier-baseline-v0 has not retrained since 2026-05-22 (runs=1) while every other model retrains daily — dropped from the cycle? Verify it's intentionally retired vs silently broken.
mes-setup-quality + mes-trade-outcome-winrate skip empty_dataset every cycle (low MES journal volume) — recurring coverage gap.
All 34 models are status=candidate / stage shadow-or-below: nothing influences live orders. So no advisory/live_approved degradation risk this window.

list-models JSON is too verbose to pull whole through the diag relay (truncates at ~55KB); used a jq one-liner to extract per-model stage+metric. Heredoc python in the relay fails (the relay indents the cmd body) — jq is the reliable path.
recommended_action: No operator action required now. Trainer clean (rc=0, 33/34 retrained); no model influences orders so nothing is degrading on live capital. ONE upcoming Tier-3 decision: btc-regime-1h-lgbm-yz-v1 (macro_f1=0.663) finishes its shadow soak 2026-06-12 — re-run gate-check then and, if ready:true, bring the shadow->advisory promotion to the operator. Forward work: augment MES decision-model datasets with backtest rows (unblocks the empty_dataset skips); audit/retire the two weak research heads.
claude_channel_ping: /ml-review 6/6-6/10: 34 models (20 shadow/14 research), all retrained clean rc=0. trainer=ok. None above shadow (0 order influence). Top head btc-regime-1h-lgbm-yz-v1 macro_f1=0.663 — soak done 6/12, gate-check then. Watches: MES setup-quality empty_dataset; mes-regime-classifier-baseline-v0 stale (1 run). 2 experiments proposed.
